title: malus caroli
intro: Malus caroli, also known as the Korean crabapple, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Malus caroli include its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can help boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Malus caroli can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
